headline: Chips Up, Confidence Down: AI Demand Drives Friday's Rally Despite Record Consumer Pessimism
summary: When the headline number looks great but the fine print is quietly alarming, that's a market worth paying attention to.

headline: Monster Beverage (MNST) Is Up 11.9% After Record Q1 Results And Ongoing Buybacks - What's Changed
summary: In early May 2026, Monster Beverage Corporation reported first-quarter 2026 results with net sales of US$2.35 billion and net income of US$569.49 million, both higher than a year earlier, alongside basic and diluted earnings per share of US$0.58. The company also completed a share repurchase of 1,353,991 shares for US$101.08 million, while international sales growth and energy drink demand drove record first-quarter revenues. We’ll now examine how Monster’s record international-driven...
